common.artistsPageDescription: Browse jazz musicians, groups, and big bands from around the world.
common.eventsPageDescription: Discover upcoming jazz events, concerts, and jam sessions worldwide.
common.venuesPageDescription: Explore jazz venues and live music spots across the globe.
common.citiesPageDescription: Jazz scenes around the world — venues, artists, and events by city.
common.cityPageDescription: Discover jazz venues, events, and artists in {city}.
common.manifesto: Mapping the city's heartbeat, one note at a time.
common.manifestoL1: Good jazz doesn't need overpackaging — it needs to be heard.
common.manifestoL2: In an era where algorithms drown out authentic sound, JazzNode chooses to amplify those who focus on the essence of music.
common.manifestoL3: We don't chase glossy commercial lineups — we navigate the real sessions tucked in bar corners, brimming with soul and improvisational spark.
common.manifestoL4: This is an underground jazz guide, built for those who truly know good music.
common.collaborationGraphHint: Drag nodes to rearrange · scroll to zoom · line thickness = collaboration frequency
common.messageArtistDisabled: Know this artist? Invite them to claim their page to unlock direct messaging.
common.messageArtistDisabledLabel: Messaging unavailable — artist has not claimed their page
common.messageVenueDisabled: Know this venue? Invite them to claim their page to unlock direct messaging.
common.messageVenueDisabledLabel: Messaging unavailable — venue has not claimed their page
common.stayConnectedDesc: Follow this venue to get notified about upcoming shows and announcements.
common.magazineSubtitle: Stories, interviews, and deep dives into the world of live jazz across Asia.
common.magazineEmpty: No articles published yet. Stay tuned.
common.premiumComingSoon: Premium is coming soon — stay tuned!
common.newEventsPageDescription: Browse recently added jazz events from scraper updates.

forVenues.heroSubtitle: JazzNode builds your venue's official website — payment integration, event management, and brand customization, all in one place.
forVenues.feat1Desc: JazzNode handles ticketing and payments directly. Fans buy tickets on your venue page, payments deposited automatically. No third-party platform needed.
forVenues.feat2Desc: Add events with one click, upload posters, AI generates content in 6 languages. Scheduling, fan notifications, and post-show reports all automated.
forVenues.feat3Desc: 8 color themes, 5 font pairs, custom Hero style. Use your own domain, upload your logo. Your venue page = your official website.
forVenues.feat4Desc: AI auto-generates content in 6 languages — English, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Thai, and Indonesian. Tourists and music lovers worldwide discover your venue in their own language.
forVenues.feat5Desc: Built-in OG social previews and auto-generated promo copy. One-click sharing to Instagram, Facebook, LINE — no more time spent on formatting. Every show gets ready-made promo materials.
forVenues.feat6Desc: JazzNode is the largest jazz community platform. Your venue appears directly in front of global jazz fans — saving massive marketing costs. Fan follows, push notifications, and weekly digests all automated.
forVenues.more1Desc: Publish venue announcements that instantly push to all your followers. New events, last-minute changes, special programs — fans get notified in real time.
forVenues.more2Desc: Page views, traffic sources, fan growth trends, city distribution at a glance. Monthly auto-generated insight reports to drive your decisions.
forVenues.more3Desc: List T-shirts, vinyl records, limited-edition merch. Full display with images, pricing, and descriptions. Your venue page doubles as your shop.
forVenues.more4Desc: Embed your event calendar on your own website with a single iframe code. Auto-adapts styling, syncs in real time.
forVenues.more5Desc: Every show gets its own structured page — searchable on Google, shareable with rich previews. No more buried in IG feeds.
forVenues.more6Desc: Your messages are flagged as VIP in our inbox for priority handling. Dedicated support channel for fast resolution.
forVenues.step1Desc: Sign up for free on JazzNode.
forVenues.step2Desc: Fill in your venue details and we'll set everything up.
forVenues.step3Desc: Your venue is live! Start adding events and growing your audience.
forVenues.pricingNote: All features included. No hidden fees. Future ticketing: 3-5% commission.
forVenues.faq1Q: My venue is already on JazzNode?
forVenues.faq1A: If your venue is already listed, you can Claim it for free. After claiming, you can edit basic info. For advanced features (analytics, broadcasts, etc.), upgrade to Premium.
forVenues.faq2Q: What payment methods do you accept?
forVenues.faq2A: We currently accept bank transfer and credit card. We'll contact you after receiving your application.
forVenues.faq3A: English, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Thai, and Indonesian.
forVenues.faq4A: Yes. After activation, use the Team Management page in your dashboard to add managers by their JazzNode email. Self-service, no need to contact us.
forVenues.faq5A: Yes, monthly plans can be cancelled anytime. Annual plans are refunded for remaining months.
forVenues.bottomSubtitle: Join the JazzNode community and put your venue on the map.
forVenues.applySubtitle: Tell us about your venue and we'll get you set up.
forVenues.applySuccessDesc: We'll contact you within 24 hours to confirm payment and set up your venue.
forVenues.notesPlaceholder: Anything else you'd like us to know?
forVenues.applyDisclaimer: By submitting, you agree to be contacted regarding your Elite venue subscription.

venueSetup.step1Desc: First impressions matter. Add a photo and tell people about your venue.
venueSetup.descPlaceholder: Tell fans what makes your venue special...
venueSetup.step3Desc: Pick a color theme that matches your venue's vibe.
venueSetup.step4Desc: Let fans know what's coming up.
venueSetup.step4Hint: You can always add events later from your dashboard.
venueSetup.step5Desc: Your venue page is ready. Preview it now or head to your dashboard to keep customizing.
